heading: Detailed Personalised Artwork,
script: Created with a person's passion in mind
bodyHeading: Your story, drawn into the design
body1: During your initial design consultation with Louise, you will discuss the story that you want to tell, decide how you want your moment to be captured. Whether this is a gift to yourself or for a loved one, have your chosen message or name running right through the design.
body2: Prices depend on size and detail — starting from £40 to £150.
body2b: Larger commissioned works are discussed during consultation.

gallery.caption: Koi — framed commission
gallery.description: A flowing koi rendered entirely in hand-lettered words chosen by the client.

gallery.caption: Donkey — personalised detail
gallery.description: A playful portrait where the recipient’s name and message form every line of fur.

gallery.caption: Penguin — name woven through
gallery.description: A characterful penguin with a hidden name woven through the artwork.
